name: agent-project-memory
description: Local project memory and interruption-safe continuity for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Recover interrupted work and route project memory safely.
interface.longDescription: Keeps local turn evidence, isolated Git worktree checkpoints, exact-project memory routing, feedback promotion, and delivery checks available across Codex sessions.
defaultPrompt: Recover the interrupted work in this project.
Route only the memory for the current project.
